name: freeact-skills

metadata.name: freeact-skills
classifiers: License :: OSI Approved :: Apache Software License
metadata.summary: Library of predefined freeact agent skills

documentation:
# Freeact Skills

Library of predefined [freeact](https://github.com/gradion-ai/freeact) agent skills.

## Development

```bash
conda env create -f environment.yml
conda activate freeact-skills
poetry install --all-extras
```

functions.name: freeact_skills.reader.api.create_readwise_reader
documentation:
Creates a ReadwiseReader client instance.

Args:
    api_key: The API key for the Readwise Reader API. If not provided, it is read from
        the environment variable READWISE_API_KEY.

Returns:
    A ReadwiseReader instance.

class_variables.name: freeact_skills.reader.api.Document.id
documentation: The ID of the document in Reader.

class_variables.name: freeact_skills.reader.api.Document.url
documentation: The URL of the document in Reader.

class_variables.name: freeact_skills.reader.api.Document.source_url
documentation: The URL of the original document.

class_variables.name: freeact_skills.reader.api.Document.category
documentation: One of `article`, `email`, `rss`, `highlight`, `note`, `pdf`, `epub`, `tweet` or `video`.

class_variables.name: freeact_skills.reader.api.Document.location
documentation: One of `new`, `later`, `archive` or `feed`.

class_variables.name: freeact_skills.reader.api.Document.tags
documentation: A list of document tags.

class_variables.name: freeact_skills.reader.api.Document.note
documentation: A top-level note of the document.

methods.name: freeact_skills.reader.api.ReadwiseReader.save_document_url
documentation:
Saves a document to Readwise Reader by scraping it from the provided URL.

Args:
    url: The URL of the document to save.
    location: The location to save the document to. Must be one of ["new", "later", "archive"].
        Defaults to None.
    category: The category of the document. Must be one of ["article", "pdf", "tweet", "video"].
        Defaults to None.
    tags: The tags to add to the document. Defaults to None.
    note: A note to add to the document. Defaults to None.

methods.name: freeact_skills.reader.api.ReadwiseReader.save_document_html
documentation:
Saves the provided HTML document to Reader.

Args:
    html: The HTML content of the document to save.
    title: The title of the document.
    location: The location to save the document to. Must be one of ["new", "later", "archive"].
        Defaults to None.
    category: The category of the document. Must be one of ["article", "pdf", "tweet", "video"].
        Defaults to None.
    tags: The tags to add to the document. Defaults to None.
    note: A note to add to the document. Defaults to None.

methods.name: freeact_skills.reader.api.ReadwiseReader.list_documents
documentation:
List documents saved in Readwise Reader.

Args:
    locations: The locations to list documents from. Must be a subset of
        ["new", "later", "archive", "feed"]. Defaults to ["new", "later", "archive"].
    updated_after: Only list documents updated after this datetime. Defaults to None.

Returns:
    List of Document objects.

functions.name: freeact_skills.resume.resume.load_citations
documentation: Function for loading a list of citations, using the 'citations' url of an article or project.

classes.name: freeact_skills.resume.resume.Article
documentation: An article or blog post on Martin Krasser's blog.

functions.name: freeact_skills.search.perplexity.api.create_internet_search
documentation:
Creates an InternetSearch client instance.

Args:
    api_key: The API key for the Perplexity API. If not provided, it is read from
        the environment variable PERPLEXITY_API_KEY.

Returns:
    An InternetSearch instance.

classes.name: freeact_skills.search.perplexity.api.InternetSearch

methods.name: freeact_skills.search.perplexity.api.InternetSearch.search
documentation:
Search for up-to-date information on the internet and stream the result to stdout in markdown format.
The text contains citations using the format [1][2][3] etc.
Citations are printed at the end of the search result in the citation listing. The index (e.g. [1]) of a citation in the citation listing corresponds to the index of the citation in the search result.

Args:
    natural_language_query (str): A query string that matches a specific topic, concept, or fact.
      It should be formulated in natural language and be as specific as possible.
Search for up-to-date information on the internet

functions.name: freeact_skills.zotero.api.load_group_library
documentation:
Loads the Zotero group library identified by group_id.

The library is loaded from the local index located at index_path. To obtain the latest
updates from Zotero, the returned library object should be synced first with `sync()`.

Args:
    group_id: The ID of the Zotero group. If not defined, it is read from the environment variable ZOTERO_GROUP_ID.
    api_key: The API key for the Zotero group. If not defined, it is read from the environment variable ZOTERO_API_KEY.
    index_path: The path to the local index.

Returns:
    A GroupLibrary object.

class_variables.name: freeact_skills.zotero.api.Collection.collections

class_variables.name: freeact_skills.zotero.api.Collection.documents

methods.name: freeact_skills.zotero.api.GroupLibrary.root

methods.name: freeact_skills.zotero.api.GroupLibrary.attach_link

documentation:
Search for up-to-date information on the internet and return the result as string in markdown format.

Args:

methods.name: freeact_skills.editor.impl.EditTool._make_output
documentation: Generate output for the CLI based on the content of a file.

An filesystem editor tool that allows the agent to view, create, and edit files.
The tool parameters are defined by Anthropic and are not editable.
